title: Man's Search for Meaning
subtitle: An Introduction to Logotherapy
author: Viktor E. Frankl
excerpt: A psychiatrist's memoir of survival in Nazi concentration camps and the founding text of logotherapy — the school of psychotherapy built on the premise that the primary human drive is not pleasure but the will to find meaning. Frankl argues that even in the most extreme suffering, we retain the freedom to choose our attitude, and that life never ceases to hold meaning.
